glue.table.tableinput.CfnAbout: A structure used to define a table.

glue.table.tableinput.Name.Description: The table name. For Hive compatibility, this is folded to lowercase when it is stored.

glue.table.tableinput.Owner.Description: The table owner. Included for Apache Hive compatibility. Not used in the normal course of AWS Glue operations.

glue.table.tableinput.Parameters.Description: These key-value pairs define properties associated with the table.

glue.table.tableinput.PartitionKeys.Description: A list of columns by which the table is partitioned. Only primitive types are supported as partition keys.  When you create a table used by Amazon Athena, and you do not specify any `partitionKeys`, you must at least set the value of `partitionKeys` to an empty list. For example:   `"PartitionKeys": []`

glue.table.tableinput.Retention.Description: The retention time for this table.

glue.table.tableinput.StorageDescriptor.Description: A storage descriptor containing information about the physical storage of this table.

glue.table.tableinput.TableType.Description: The type of this table. AWS Glue will create tables with the `EXTERNAL_TABLE` type. Other services, such as Athena, may create tables with additional table types.    AWS Glue related table types:    EXTERNAL_TABLE  Hive compatible attribute - indicates a non-Hive managed table.  GOVERNED  Used by AWS Lake Formation. The AWS Glue Data Catalog understands `GOVERNED`.

glue.table.tableinput.TargetTable.Description: A `TableIdentifier` structure that describes a target table for resource linking.

glue.table.tableinput.ViewExpandedText.Description: Included for Apache Hive compatibility. Not used in the normal course of AWS Glue operations.

glue.table.tableinput.ViewOriginalText.Description: Included for Apache Hive compatibility. Not used in the normal course of AWS Glue operations. If the table is a `VIRTUAL_VIEW`, certain Athena configuration encoded in base64.
